1_typecheck_and_build.build_note: Vite build completed with the existing large chunk warning only.

notes: Initial bump_image attempt correctly failed fast because GHCR had not yet exposed the v1.10.2 manifest. The release image workflow then completed and the second lifecycle bump succeeded.

3_redeploy_gui.notes: bump_image local lifecycle updated deployment/gui from v1.10.1 to v1.10.2; kubectl rollout status passed and the running pod reports ghcr.io/noetl/gui:v1.10.2. The local-runtime playbook ended after verify_images because summarize is a python step unsupported in local mode, but the deployment mutation and verification had already succeeded.

4_smoke_canvas_widget_visibility.query: flights from SFO to JFK on 2026-07-15 for 2 adults
4_smoke_canvas_widget_visibility.screenshot_note: The in-app browser screenshot API and macOS screencapture both failed during capture; DOM evidence confirmed the widget and refresh persistence.
notes: The form-submit fix worked: pressing Enter stayed on /travel instead of navigating to /catalog.
The assistant bubble rendered the app:column friendly-error widget below the chat entry.
Hard refresh preserved the original query and widget through sessionStorage.
Clicking the widget's 'rerun this search' button still navigated to /catalog instead of resubmitting in-place; this keeps the round AMBER.

5_smoke_report_summary.notes: The render-emitting path is fixed. The non-render fallback still prints result=- when the projected result is empty; that is compactJson's existing empty-payload behavior.

regressions_found.name: Canvas widget command button still navigates to /catalog
regressions_found.details: After the v1.10.2 deploy, direct canvas submit stayed on /travel and rendered the widget. However, clicking the widget's 'rerun this search' button navigated to /catalog. This is likely a separate widget command-routing issue in the canvas surface, distinct from the AntD form-submit default fixed in this round.

regressions_found.name: Screenshot capture failed in the in-app browser
regressions_found.details: DOM validation succeeded, but both tab.playwright.screenshot / tab.cua.get_visible_screenshot and macOS screencapture failed in this desktop session, so no screenshot artifact was captured.

notes: The primary canvas form-submit regression is fixed: Enter stayed on /travel and did not bounce through /catalog.
Canvas widget visibility and refresh persistence are green.
Report formatter is fixed for render-emitting executions: summary now shows render=app:column.
Terminal prompt regression remains green for help, flights, and locations.
No GREEN validation log paragraph was appended because the canvas widget rerun button still fails the task's button-callback acceptance criterion.
deferred_followups: Fix canvas widget command routing so app:button event.key=command resubmits in-place from /travel instead of navigating to /catalog.
Audit table re-add as side effect inside each render_* step.
Gateway SSE callback re-add as side effect.
Phase 2 travel agent uses Amadeus MCP server internally.
Pin design rule in architecture/agent_orchestration.md: render-emitting step is the workflow tail; audit/callback are side effects.
Pin GUI rule: Input.Search / Enter-handling inputs inside routed pages need explicit form preventDefault wrappers.
